# TrackLinks — Free Campaign URL Builder
# llms.txt — AI crawler content index

## What We Do
Build trackable marketing links with UTM parameters. Free, no sign-up. Dark dashboard design.

## Key Differentiators
- Pre-filled platform presets (Google Ads, Facebook, TikTok, email)
- Dark dashboard UI (unique among UTM builders)
- 100+ UTM-specific guide pages with educational content

## Primary Content
- Homepage: / — tool + platform presets
- Platform pages: /utm/google-ads/, /utm/facebook-ads/, /utm/tiktok-ads/ — 45 platform-specific pages
- Guides: /utm-best-practices.html, /utm-parameters-explained.html, /what-is-utm.html

## FAQ
Q: Free? A: Yes, 100% free, no signup, no limits.
Q: What are UTM parameters? A: Tags added to URLs that tell Google Analytics where traffic comes from.
